title: tourneuxia variifolia
intro: Tourneuxia variifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Tourneuxia variifolia or various-leaved tourneuxia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tourneuxia variifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Tourneuxia variifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used externally as a poultice or compress to treat various health conditions.
